name: io.github.us-all/dbt
description: dbt MCP — manifest/run_results/sources/catalog parsing + DQ result tables (BigQuery/Postgres)

environmentVariables.name: DBT_PROJECT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to dbt project root (where dbt_project.yml lives).

environmentVariables.name: DBT_RUN_HISTORY_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Optional dir for archived run_results.json history (glob-scanned).

environmentVariables.name: DQ_RESULTS_TABLE
environmentVariables.description: Fully qualified DQ checks table, e.g. 'project.data_ops.quality_checks'.

environmentVariables.name: DQ_SCORE_TABLE
environmentVariables.description: Fully qualified DQ score-daily table, e.g. 'project.data_ops.quality_score_daily'.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Service account key path for BigQuery (ADC fallback supported).

environmentVariables.name: BQ_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Explicit BigQuery project ID for DQ queries.

environmentVariables.name: DBT_ALLOW_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: Reserved for future write tools. Default read-only.
